Episodes.Title: Nuts and Bolts
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Corey Shurge
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Jimi Shlag, Kelly Penner
Episodes.Plot: Emery Worldwide cargo flight 17 crashes soon after takeoff in Sacramento, California.

Episodes.Title: Blown Away
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Svet Rouskov
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, George Chiang, Hugh Tran
Episodes.Plot: Trans Asia 222 crashes into buildings during approach to land in bad weather at Magong Airport, Penghu Island, Taiwan, on 23 July 2014.

Episodes.Title: Deadly Distraction
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, James Battiston
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Mark Burgess, David Patrick Flemming
Episodes.Plot: A Boeing 727, crashes while taking off from Dallas/Fort Worth International Airport on August 31 1988.

Episodes.Title: Deadly Airspace
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Mark Van de Ven
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Richard Tse, Jonathan Kim
Episodes.Plot: A commercial airliner goes down in eastern Ukraine, and the evidence indicates that it was shot down.

Episodes.Title: Deadly Display
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Julia Nunes
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Genadijs Dolganovs, Yury Ruzhyev
Episodes.Plot: A Russian-made Superjet slams into an infamous mountain, while on a demonstration flight in Indonesia.

Episodes.Title: Deadly Mission
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Svet Rouskov
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Adam Langton, Mark MacRae
Episodes.Plot: In the Mojave Desert, Virgin Galactic test pilots are at the controls of a revolutionary aircraft. But as the spaceship accelerates toward the outer reaches of Earth's atmosphere, it breaks apart and falls from the sky.

Episodes.Title: Free Fall
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Leslie Cote
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Jerry Getty, Dan Bowers
Episodes.Plot: Qantas Airways flight 72 nearly falls out of the sky, resulting in investigators searching for the threatening flaw

Episodes.Title: Deadly Inclination
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, James Battiston
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Joseph Di Mambro, Joey Belfiore
Episodes.Plot: Swiss investigators must determine how a seasoned Alitalia crew flew their DC-9 into the ground just a few miles short of a Zurich runway.

Episodes.Title: Dead of Winter (Continental Airlines Flight 1713)
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Alex Bystram
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Chris Lightfoot, Daniel Falk
Episodes.Plot: After being delayed on the Denver tarmac due to heavy snow, Continental Airlines 1713 was eventually cleared for take-off. Barely lifting off the ground, the DC-9 abruptly banked and crashed, killing 28 people and leaving a lastin...

Episodes.Title: Communication Breakdown
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Christopher Blow
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Joanne Boland, Benjamin Muir
Episodes.Plot: This special looked at how failures in communication lead to disasters. United Express Flight 5925, Garuda Indonesia Flight 152, and the Tenerife airport disaster are the incidents that are focused on.

Episodes.Title: Bad Attitude
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Nick Stojanovic
Episodes.Plot: This special looked at how pilots' aggressive or unprofessional behavior can cause deadly accidents.

Episodes.Title: Explosive Evidence
Episodes.Plot: This special looks at terrorist acts, including bombings and shoot-downs on flights Metrojet Flight 9268, Korean Air Lines Flight 007, and Malaysia Airlines Flight 17.

Episodes.Title: Deadly Distractions
Episodes.Plot: This special looked at how pilots' deviation from cockpit duties lead to crashes and involved Delta Air Lines Flight 1141,Eastern Air Lines Flight 401, and 2012 Mount Salak Sukhoi Superjet crash.

Episodes.Title: Fire on Board
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Jerry Rector
Episodes.Plot: A special looking at disasters caused by fires, either on the ground or in the air, and involving British Airtours Flight 28M, Nigeria Airways Flight 2120, and UPS Airlines Flight 6.
